title: Roasted Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish featuring richly roasted lamb, perfect for a summer evening. This recipe showcases the tender and juicy Norwegian lamb in a delicious kebab.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the lamb with the remaining marinade.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until the lamb is cooked through and slightly charred.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
Let the lamb rest for 5 minutes before serving.
